summary: Task-class → model routing for the inference broker. Local-first (Ollama) for daily / offline; NVIDIA NIM hybrid for frontier coder models that don't fit on local hardware (Patch N).

routine_summary.summary: Cheap log compression + pack rendering. Local first.

patch_builder.summary: Generate code patches in isolated worktrees. Patch N (2026-04-27): NIM enabled, hybrid local+NIM. Local first for offline / daily, NIM frontier coder when it fits the prompt. Order: smaller-fast → bigger-accurate. qwen2.5-coder:14b validated as local primary (selectionRate 2/3 in Patch M comparison batch). qwen2.5:72b is the local diversity alt (1/16, but the wins are real). NIM coder models are unproven on this loop — bake at low volume to compare Wilson lower bounds vs. local before promoting.

adversarial_review.summary: Attack a candidate patch. Diversity matters more than raw quality — different model families surface different bug classes. Patch N adds NIM Kimi-thinking + GLM for diversity beyond the local Qwen+DeepSeek pair.

research_extraction.summary: Read sources and produce a claim ledger.

merge_arbiter.summary: Final merge recommendation. Stays on the strongest trusted model. Empty until a frontier model is wired explicitly — broker will return a clear error rather than guess.
